total_contract_value.description: Contract value drives accounts payable/receivable workflows, budget tracking, and financial reporting; errors cascade to P&L impacts and procurement thresholds

sow_number.description: SOW number is the primary identifier for linking invoices, purchase orders, and deliverable tracking; extraction errors cause reconciliation failures

payment_terms.description: Payment terms directly drive invoice automation and cash flow management; inaccurate extraction causes late payments or disputes

ip_ownership.description: IP ownership classification affects asset registration, licensing strategy, and competitive positioning; errors have long-term legal consequences

effective_date.description: Effective date anchors SLA obligations, billing start, and project timeline; must be accurately extracted

end_date.description: End date triggers project close-out, final invoicing, and renewal evaluation; accuracy required for contract lifecycle management

client_name.description: Client identity required for CRM linkage, revenue attribution, and contract reporting

vendor_name.description: Vendor identity required for vendor management, OFAC screening, and payment routing

pricing_model.description: Pricing model determines billing automation logic and financial controls; errors cause incorrect invoice processing

deliverables.description: Deliverable list drives project milestone tracking and acceptance workflow; incomplete extraction causes gaps in obligation management

governing_law.description: Governing law determines applicable contract and dispute rules; lower threshold acceptable as this rarely changes payment workflows
